data.body: EARLY-LAND DECISION: completion-verifier checks origin/main (not the local/Gerrit tree), so it fails every ticket because my code isn't merged yet ('README has no session-log documentation' etc). This is the skill's early-land exception (tickets verifiable only after landing). REGRESSION-SAFETY CHECK (satisfied): (1) all 12 changes are LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1; (2) blast radius is near-zero at runtime — changes are docs/prose, NEW standalone CI-only scripts (check_docs_index/check_readme_quickstart/gen_cli_reference/gen_mcp_reference), new CI gate steps, and DOCSTRING-ONLY edits to _commands/{leaf,_seam,__init__}.py (no code paths changed); (3) the FULL assembled stack was tested — change 575 (top, includes all 12) passed CI's Verified gate = full gerrit-verify suite green on the complete merged tree. Therefore landing is safe. Submitting stack top (575) which submits all ancestors atomically, then closing tickets against landed origin/main.
